title: stylidium capillare
intro: Stylidium capillare, also known as the needle triggerplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Australian indigenous medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Stylidium capillare include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stylidium capillare can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a salve or cream to apply topically.
